name: Salted Pumpkin Seeds
recipeInstructions:
1. Use seeds of the Halloween pumpkin.
2. Combine water and salt in a saucepan. Cook and stir until the salt dissolves; let cool.
3. Add pumpkin seeds and soak overnight. Drain thoroughly.
4. Pat seeds dry with a paper towel.
5. Place on a cookie sheet. Bake at 300°F until seeds are dry, about 1 hour.
Yield: 2 cups, 8 servings
Nutrition: 92 calories, 2 fat exchanges
